memberdef.name: PDJE_RESOLVE_DISPATCH_SYMBOL
memberdef.initializer: dispatch.name = reinterpret_cast<decltype(dispatch.name)>( \ OpenCLibrarySymbol(handle, #name)); \ if (dispatch.name == nullptr) { \ return false; \ }

memberdef.name: PDJE_OPENCL_INT_WRAPPER
memberdef.initializer: extern "C" CL_API_ENTRY cl_int CL_API_CALL \ name signature \ { \ const auto *dispatch = GetOpenCLRuntimeDispatch(); \ if (dispatch == nullptr || dispatch->name == nullptr) { \ return failureCode; \ } \ return dispatch->name arguments; \ }

memberdef.name: PDJE_OPENCL_HANDLE_WRAPPER
memberdef.initializer: extern "C" CL_API_ENTRY returnType CL_API_CALL \ name signature \ { \ const auto *dispatch = GetOpenCLRuntimeDispatch(); \ if (dispatch == nullptr || dispatch->name == nullptr) { \ if (errcode_ret_name != nullptr) { \ *errcode_ret_name = GetUnavailableOpenCLError(); \ } \ return nullptr; \ } \ return dispatch->name arguments; \ }

memberdef.name: PDJE_OPENCL_VOIDPTR_WRAPPER
memberdef.initializer: extern "C" CL_API_ENTRY void * CL_API_CALL \ name signature \ { \ const auto *dispatch = GetOpenCLRuntimeDispatch(); \ if (dispatch == nullptr || dispatch->name == nullptr) { \ return nullptr; \ } \ return dispatch->name arguments; \ }
